name: Spike
about: Time-boxed research or investigation with a concrete output
title: "SPIKE-XXX: "
labels: "type: spike"

## Epic
<!-- Link to parent epic if applicable: #N -->

## Question
<!-- The single question this spike must answer. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why does answering this question unblock future work? -->

## Time Box
<!-- Maximum time to spend. Example: 2 hours -->

## Output Required
<!-- What artifact must exist when this spike closes?
     Example: ADR file, updated test matrix, file:line evidence list -->

## Definition of Done for This Spike
- [ ] Question answered with file:line evidence (not guessing)
- [ ] Output artifact exists
- [ ] Follow-up stories created if work is needed

## Risk
<!-- P0 / P1 / P2 / P3 -->
